23rd year he will get settled in life. A happy married life with few children
is indicated. One son will visit many places. He will have conveyances and
live in plenty.
CHART 474
Jupiter, Venus, Ketu, the Sun
Sat.
Moon and Mercury-all five planets are in
Dh.
- Libra with Mars who denotes husband.
The husband of the native will
be a very rich man. All the same the
Sun Sun is in debilitation. Mars is placed
Mer.
between Jupiter and Venus, and as
Ven.
Mars pected by Saturn and Rahu from the
Dt, 7th. By about 60-63, the native with
Jupt
her children will have to run the whole
show with all comforts of life. She will live upto 84 years of age. After 83, she
will have to face a little opposition from her children.
CHART 475
In this case as Mercury placed in Sagittarius has Venus and Jupiter in
the 2nd house to him. The native will be a man learned in 2 or 3 branches of

312 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
science. The Sun is also in Sagittarius.
Dh.
